1) Government Circular Finance Department, No. Finance-2025 / No.44 / Finance-3D. 07.04.2025

3) Government Circular, Department of Finance, No. 29.01.2026

Government Refunds -
Under the Tribal Components Programme, Demand No. T-6, 5054, Capital expenditure on roads and bridges,
Schemes under Five Year Plans, 04 - Districts and Other Routes, 796 - Development Action for Scheduled Tribes
Schemes, (01) Schemes under Tribal Area Deployment, Schemes under State Schemes, (01) (07) Districts and
Other Routes (State Level Plan) (5054 5117), 53 - Tribal under the heading Major Constructions
For roads and bridges in sub-plans, the year 2025-26 is under reference from this year's budgeted funds.
The funds were disbursed as per the Government decision at No. 4. However, Nashik in the said order
of the district (Art. 258 to Art. No.337) Improvement in funds disbursed to 80 works
is being done. Also, Reference No. Works in Nandurbar District in Government Decision 4.
Incorporation has been unintentionally made in the works in Nashik district (A.N. 233 to A.N. 235). Accordingly
Works in Nashik district include 3 works mentioned in A.No.233 to A.No.235 Nandurbar
It is being done in the district. Accordingly, the above amendments / changes should be read as follows.
District: - Nashik (Rs. in millions).
